title: Sphaeroma obtusilobum
taxonomy: Sphaeroma obtusilobum is classified within the phylum Arthropoda, specifically within the subphylum Crustacea. It belongs to the infraorder Isopoda, and the family Sphaeromatidae. This isopod is further classified into the genus Sphaeroma and the species S. obtusilobum. The classification of Sphaeroma obtusilobum provides insight into its evolutionary relationships with other crustaceans. By examining its classification, researchers can better understand the characteristics and behaviors of this species.
